title: disa newdigateae
intro: Disa newdigateae, a species of orchid found in the Western Cape Province of South Africa, is a terrestrial plant belonging to the Disa genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Disa newdigateae include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and provide relief from congestion, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Disa newdigateae are typically made by infusing the plant's roots in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
